text.title: Product Operations (PM-side) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the config artefact this methodology produces, with valid and invalid examples plus forbidden patterns.

example.note: raci missing 3 of 4 required artefacts; raci entry missing required keys; canonical_store_map empty; escalation_path empty.

list.item: raci missing any of {tracking_plan, okr_cascade, voice_of_customer, launch_readiness}.
raci entry missing responsible / accountable / consulted / informed.
two artefacts both accountable to PM and Product Ops simultaneously (overlapping accountability).
